title: Uplands Turbine Partners
content:
Uplands Turbine Partners is a optical components company founded in 1967 and headquartered in Westmere. Willa Morven served as chief executive during its international expansion phase.

History.

Competitors accused the company of undercutting service contracts, prompting a trade review.

Operations.

The firm's research division partners with universities testing next-generation alloys.

Products.

Willa Morven negotiated distribution agreements that opened markets in two neighboring republics.

Corporate affairs.

Environmental audits in 2008 led to closed-loop cooling systems at the main plant.
